sections.title: GTM Model: Direct Technical Sales to Elevator OEMs
sections.content: The elevator guide rail market requires a **direct technical sales** approach. Purchasing decisions are made by engineering + procurement teams at elevator OEMs and builders, based on technical qualification followed by commercial negotiation. Distributors play a role only for the long tail of small installers. [SRC: web_search]

sections.title: Target Customer Tiering
sections.content:
| Tier | Customer Type | Count (DACH) | Example Companies | Approach | Timeline |
|------|-------------|-------------|------------------|----------|---------|
| T1 | Global elevator OEMs | 4 | Schindler, KONE, Otis, TK Elevator | KAM + technical qualification + central procurement | 12-18 months |
| T2 | Regional elevator builders | ~50 | Schmitt + Sohn, Osma, Tepper, Haushahn | Regional sales + plant visit + sample orders | 6-9 months |
| T3 | Modernization specialists | ~30 | Henning, Liftinstituut-approved contractors | Technical demo + project-based quoting | 3-6 months |
| T4 | Independent installers | ~200 | Small local firms | Via steel distributors (Kloeckner, ThyssenKrupp Materials) | Ongoing |

sections.title: Qualification Barriers
sections.content:
| Barrier | Description | ZOLLERN Status | Action Required | Investment |
|---------|-------------|---------------|----------------|-----------|
| EN 81-1 / EN 81-20 compliance | Safety standard for lift installation — guide rails must conform | NOT CERTIFIED | Commission EN 81-50 type test with notified body | EUR 30-50K |
| EN 81-50 type testing | Specific test protocol: load testing, deflection, hardness verification | NOT DONE | Submit T89/B samples to TUeV Sued or Bureau Veritas | EUR 20-30K (included above) |
| ISO 7465 conformity | Dimensional conformity to guide rail profile standard | ACHIEVABLE | Produce test batch, measure Cpk, issue conformity declaration | EUR 5-10K (test batch) |
| OEM supplier audit | On-site process audit (IATF-style) by elevator OEM | READY | Existing ISO 9001 infrastructure; elevator-specific documentation needed | EUR 10-15K (prep) |
| CE marking (Construction Products Regulation) | Declaration of Performance for construction-related steel products | NOT HELD | Issue DoP based on EN 10025 / EN 10083 material conformity | EUR 10-15K |
| **Total qualification investment** | | | | **EUR 55-90K** |

sections.title: Sales Cycle
sections.content:
| Phase | Duration | Activities | Deliverables |
|-------|----------|-----------|-------------|
| 1. Market awareness | Month 0-3 | Attend interlift trade fair, identify target accounts, hire KAM with elevator industry Rolodex | Target account list, KAM onboarded |
| 2. Technical introduction | Month 3-6 | Plant visits by OEM engineers, present NNS value proposition, share EN 81 type test results | Technical presentation, type test certificate |
| 3. Sample qualification | Month 6-9 | Produce T89/B sample batch (5-10 t), ship to OEM for dimensional/hardness/straightness testing | Inspection report, Cpk data, EN 10204 3.1 certs |
| 4. Trial installation | Month 9-12 | Supply rails for 1-2 pilot elevator projects; OEM monitors installation + commissioning | Installation feedback, ride quality data |
| 5. Commercial negotiation | Month 12-15 | Framework contract negotiation: pricing, MOQ, lead time guarantees, steel surcharge formula | Signed framework agreement |
| 6. Ramp-up | Month 15-18 | Regular call-off orders, production scheduling, continuous quality monitoring | Monthly shipments, KPI dashboard |

sections.title: Pricing Strategy
sections.content:
| Element | Strategy | Benchmark |
|---------|----------|-----------|
| Base price | 5-8% below incumbent (Savera/Montanstahl) to incentivize switching | EUR 1,350-1,450/t vs incumbent EUR 1,500-1,600/t |
| Steel surcharge | Pass-through indexed to Platts HRC NW Europe | Transparent, industry standard |
| Tooling NRE | One-time EUR 15-20K for T89/B, waived if >100 t committed in Year 1 | Competitive — Montanstahl charges EUR 20-30K |
| Volume rebate | 2% at 500 t/year, 4% at 1,000 t/year | Standard metalworking industry |
| Payment terms | Net 45 (standard), Net 60 for Tier 1 OEMs | Industry norm |

sections.title: Reference Customer Strategy
sections.content:
| Phase | Target | Rationale | Approach |
|-------|--------|-----------|----------|
| Phase 1 (Month 0-12) | 1 regional builder (Tier 2) | Fastest qualification cycle, relationship-driven, lower switching cost | Direct approach by KAM, offer free trial batch |
| Phase 2 (Month 12-18) | 1 additional Tier 2 + 1 modernization specialist | Build track record and case studies | Leverage Phase 1 reference |
| Phase 3 (Month 18-24) | 1 Tier 1 OEM regional division (e.g., Schindler DE) | Use Tier 2 references + EN 81 certification + NNS cost case | Formal RFQ response, plant audit |
| Phase 4 (Month 24-36) | Second Tier 1 OEM | Scale position | Proven supplier status, competitive pricing |

sections.title: Channel Architecture
sections.content:
| Channel | Segment | Revenue Share (Year 3) | Margin | Management |
|---------|---------|----------------------|--------|-----------|
| Direct KAM (dedicated) | Tier 1 OEMs | 40% | 25-30% gross | 1 KAM full-time |
| Direct regional sales | Tier 2 builders + modernization | 45% | 28-35% gross | 1 regional sales manager |
| Distributor (indirect) | Tier 4 small installers | 15% | 18-22% gross | Kloeckner/ThyssenKrupp partnership |

sections.title: Marketing & Sales Enablement
sections.content:
| Asset | Purpose | Cost | Timeline |
|-------|---------|------|---------|
| Technical data sheet (T89/B, T127/B) | Product specification for engineering teams | EUR 3K | Month 1-2 |
| NNS value calculator (Excel/web tool) | Quantify material savings for customer's specific application | EUR 8K | Month 2-4 |
| Plant tour video (Laucherthal rolling mill) | Remote qualification support, trust building | EUR 5K | Month 3-4 |
| interlift booth (biennial trade fair) | Industry visibility, lead generation | EUR 25K per event | Next event: Oct 2027 |
| Technical whitepaper: "Grain flow advantages in guide rail profiles" | Thought leadership, SEO, trade publication placement | EUR 5K | Month 4-6 |

sections.title: KPI Dashboard (Year 1)
sections.content:
| KPI | Target | Measurement |
|-----|--------|-------------|
| Qualified accounts | 5 | Accounts where sample evaluation completed |
| Trial installations completed | 2 | Pilot projects with ride quality data |
| Framework contracts signed | 1 | Signed volume commitment |
| Volume shipped (t) | 200 | Production + delivery records |
| Revenue | EUR 300K | Invoiced sales |
| Customer NPS | >7 | Post-delivery survey |
| On-time delivery (OTIF) | >95% | Logistics tracking |
